item.title: Remaining operate/ timeout constants not in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: All operate/ timeout and interval constants have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No local timeout literals remain in any operate/ submodule.
item.description: BUG-038 explicitly scoped to gateway/ and operate/doctor/ + secure/credentials/ only. The remaining operate/ modules all define local EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS or DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MS constants: src/operate/monitor/recovery.ts:21 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000), src/operate/monitor/alerts.ts:27 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000), src/operate/status/status.ts:26 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000), src/operate/status/status.ts:27 (DEFAULT_WATCH_INTERVAL_MS = 5_000), src/operate/logs/logs.ts:17 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000), src/operate/updater/updater.ts:27 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000), src/operate/monitor/monitor.ts:32 (DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000), src/operate/backup/backup.ts:35 (GPG_TIMEOUT_MS = 60_000). Steps: (1) add MONITOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=10_000, RECOVERY_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=30_000, STATUS_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=10_000, STATUS_WATCH_INTERVAL_MS=5_000, LOGS_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=30_000, UPDATER_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=30_000, MONITOR_HEALTH_INTERVAL_MS=30_000, BACKUP_GPG_TIMEOUT_MS=60_000 to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace local constants in each file; (3) run operate/ tests. Scope: 8 files, no logic change. Direct follow-up to BUG-038.
